title: JavaScript Void Keyword Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of the void operator and its common usage in JavaScript.

questions.question: What is the primary role of the void operator in JavaScript?
options: It evaluates an expression and returns undefined.
It checks if a variable is void.

questions.question: Why is the void operator often used in HTML anchor tags (<a>)?
options: To make the link open in a new tab.
To prevent the page from jumping or reloading when a link is clicked.
To add a specific color to the link.

questions.question: In an IIFE (Immediately Invoked Function Expression), what can void be used for?
options: To treat a function as an expression instead of a declaration.
To pause the execution of the function.

questions.question: Which of the following is equivalent to using void in an anchor tag?
options: return false; within an onclick handler
